COE_RCT_IND_OVERALL_RJ: {"COE_RCT_IND_OVERALL_RJ": "Darolutamide did not increase the toxicity associated with ADT and docetaxel in disease volume and risk subgroups. The incidence of adverse events (AEs) was similar between treatment groups across all high-volume and low-volume disease and high-risk and low-risk disease subgroups, consistent with the overall ARASENS population. The safety profile was favorable and indicated good tolerability."}
